moderators.language_notes: Language switcher available in header with English and Chinese options

evidence.API_evidence: API documentation exists for Zepp OS Mini Program development with configuration files, runtime settings, and device app APIs. Zeus CLI provides compilation and preview commands.
evidence.SDK_evidence: Zeus CLI command line tools, simulator downloads, JavaScript-based development framework, GitHub repositories with JavaScript libraries and tools
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI model APIs, agent platforms, or AI assistance tools found
evidence.language_evidence: Language switcher in header shows English/Chinese options. Extensive multilingual support in app.json configuration with 30+ languages including Chinese, Arabic, German, French, Japanese, Korean, etc.

coding_notes: Platform provides comprehensive developer portal with API docs, SDK tools, simulator, blog, Discord community, GitHub presence, and app store. Clear evidence of role-based access through permissions system, data governance through developer agreements, and certification process for app store submissions.

changes.GIT_prog_lang_list: "JavaScript; C; HTML; Shell" → "Bash/Shell; C; HTML/CSS; JavaScript"
